Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Adjustable Shoulder Strap, Airline Approved, Breathable, Expandable

about_item: DESIGNED FOR IN-CABIN TRAVEL: Specifically engineered to meet most major airlines' under-seat dimensions (18"x11"x11"). While the outer size is optimized for boarding, the internal cozy space is best for pets up to 15"L x 9"H. This precise design ensures your pet can accompany you in the cabin rather than in the cargo hold

IN-FLIGHT "FIRST CLASS" SUITE: Don't let your pet suffer in a cramped box for hours. While the compact design fits strictly under airline seats for takeoff, you can unzip the expandable sides during the flight to give your furry friend a spacious "private suite." This 4-way expansion provides 150% more room for them to stretch, turn around, and settle in comfortably, effectively reducing meowing and travel anxiety throughout the journey

MEASURE BEFORE YOU FLY: To ensure a seamless boarding experience, please measure your pet’s length and height. Weight (up to 15 lbs) is only a reference. Your pet’s comfort depends on their ability to lie down comfortably within the 15"x9"x9" interior usable space. If your pet is close to this limit, we recommend our XL size for non-airline use

VERSATILE TRAVEL COMPANION: Beyond the plane, it's a road trip essential. Features a luggage strap for airport navigation, seatbelt loops for car safety, and a reinforced handle. The entire bag is made of durable, breathable mesh to ensure your pet stays cool and calm in crowded terminals

EASY CARE & PRO-TIP: Includes a removable, machine-washable fleece bed for a fresh scent every trip. Note: As a high-precision folding product, please glide zippers gently during initial setup to ensure long-term durability of the expansion tracks

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality and appreciate its expandability, with the ability to transform into much larger space for their pets. Moreover, the carrier is roomy and comfortable, with one customer noting that the little windows make it nice for kitties to be comfortable. Additionally, they find it great for travel, with one mentioning it goes with them on vacations and road trips. However, the sturdiness and zipper quality receive mixed feedback - while some find it sturdy, others report it falling apart after 15 minutes, and while some praise the zippers, others find them weak and hard to maneuver.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: Great carrier enough room for a 27 lb cat that's 26" long not counting his tail! Bottom could be a little sturdier but overall a great carrier
Bought these for our flight from Germany to the states and it was a very sturdy carrier, only complaint was it didn’t fit under the airplane seats...
This is the second one I’ve purchased since I have 2 cats. Great product and the cats love it, even when I put my 2 cats both in together....
This came packed very nicely. I could not believe what a great quality it turned out to be because the price was very reasonable when comparing...

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier spacious, being big enough for cats and dogs up to 15 pounds, with one customer noting it has room for blankets and toys.

examples.snippet: It is spacious and well designed. Light by itself and suitable for traveling. The only thing about it is the zippers, they are not as steady.
...It is very sturdy. Well worth the money! There is plenty of room and you can unzipped the sides and mesh will appear so your dog can see you....
...back which is meant to be used on the handle of your suitcase, is too small. So I can't slide the carrier on to the suitcase handle....
...However, as a human I love this bag. It's soft but sturdy, it's roomy so I have seen him stretch out in it, Although he's meowing for me to let him...

insights.title: Travel-friendly
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier great for travel, particularly mentioning its suitability for flights and car rides.

examples.snippet: ...I love the extra space after unzipping the sides. It was great for traveling. The sturdiness I would be a little concerned with a much heavier dog....
Great for airline travel. Sturdy, and easy to carry. Better than the expensive ones and lots of space for a large cat or small dog. Would recommend!
Great for travel it could be a tad bit sturdier but all around good carrier
This is a great travel bag, the only thing wrong is the pad inside. We wash it once & it came apart. We ended up buying another pad to go inside....

insights.summary: Customers appreciate the expandability of the pet carrier, noting that it can expand all the way around and provides more stretching room.

insights.title: Space
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's spacious design, which can transform into a larger area for pets up to 15 lbs and offers plenty of room with the sides closed. The carrier provides multiple options for accommodating one or two pets.

Love all of the extra room our cat has when it is opened up! Even her vet noted how wonderful it was and that he had never seen one like it!
Our guinea pigs love it! It gives them enough room to move around, but enclosed enough to feel secure! Easy to clean. Would buy again!

Very flimsy, uneven (one side seemed taller than the other side in terms of amount of material), and the mesh I could see being easily ripped out by...

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic carrier!
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this in June of 2021 and waited until now, February of 2022, to write this review (I wanted to really test it out and see how it held up) and I’m pleased to say I absolutely love this carrier! Keep in mind the attached photos are current so pardon any soil/hair you may see but I wanted to show how it has held up after 8 months.SPACE:I purchased the x-large in case I needed to put both cats in one bag in the event of an emergency then once in a safer place I could open the sides to let them spread out. For regular use it provides my 10 lb cat with a ton of space.SHAPE:Other carriers I’ve had have all ultimately succumbed to collapse and/or the metal rods giving it shape have bent or the tabs holding them in place have ripped. This carrier has maintained its shape and has proven very durable.DURABILITY:Another plus for me is the durability of the mesh used. Said 10 lb cat is not a fan of carriers, or anything that restricts her movement, and has destroyed many a mesh inset. She had a couple of episodes in this carrier and the mesh came out of it no worse for the wear. While she was able to force her claws in the tiny space she was not able to rip through it like she did the others. The zippers are strong and easy to work.FEATURES:I love the ability to open all 4 sides. It allows more options to open the sides when setting the bag down on different sized surfaces. It comes with the standard top and front side access that most carriers have but it goes a step further in allowing access via all the mesh expansions as well. In total you have the 2 animals access points when closed and 5 when expanded! I like this for security reasons if ever there’s an emergency and you need to get your pet out fast. There’s a good sized, secure pocket on one long side to hook over the pull handle of rolling luggage which I also use to loop a seatbelt through in the car. On the same side are 2 tabs for use with straps in a car to attach to a seat or to hang items from like a leash, poop bags (for dog owners), or additional storage/supplies bag(s).The downsides:There’s only a couple of changes I would make to this bag. They’re more of just a nitpick on my part and things I hope the company will consider if they every revamp the bag…1. There are little velcro tabs on the inside (1 on each length) to help keep the folded mesh contained. They are not very strong and won’t stay hooked. Luckily the mesh is pretty thick and, in combination with the supports, stays in place but it’s still a bit annoying because it can encroach on the available space. I plan on adding my own extra strong, and longer, velcro pieces to each end of the long sides at the very least.2. Storage space. There is 1 pocked on the narrow back side but it’s very thin and you really can’t put much more in there than a couple of receipts. I have small hands but even I have to squeeze my hand in there and the zipper teeth scrape it. I’d like to see a more spacious pocket when I can store the cats collars and tags when they are home as well as a baggy of food, the tube of medication one of them is on, a small comfort toy (one has anxiety), and emergency information on my girls and how to reach myself or vet for when we are traveling. Right now I have a small makeup bag attached to hold this stuff. It works but it gets in the way and really kind of ruins the aesthetic since it doesn’t match and swings around.
authors_reviews.author: Kindle

authors_reviews.title: Great Pet Carrier!
authors_reviews.text: I got a new kitten in November just before Thanksgiving and knew I wanted to travel with her. My previous furbaby had a hard case and I rarely traveled with her because it wasn't comfortable or roomy!After searching online and reading reviews, I found this one. It arrived very quickly and was easy to figure out how to expand as shown in the pictures. I used in Thanksgiving weekend to go to my sisters which is a 5 hour drive.; It was easy to travel with, left her plenty of room, and she pretty much feel asleep in it. I used it again for Christmas week, making the same drive and I got the same results. We were there a lot longer but she would find this and sleep & play in it.Overall, it's very sturdy and comfortable with lots of room for you pet. The material is made to last. It would fit a small dog as well.
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie

authors_reviews.title: Great carrier! Fit on Alaska Airlines Flight!
authors_reviews.text: This was the third carrier I bought that I was finally satisfied with. I purchased the Large 18X11X11 and was able to fit my 18lb shih tzu no problem. The expandable sides were a game changer! When we were sitting at our gate, we could expand all four sides to make more of a “pen” for him. Then, when we were on the flight, we could expand one to two sides to give him some more room. As you can see from the photos, he stretched out and fell asleep!There are only a few things I would change about this carrier, which is why I’m only giving it four stars.1. The base of the carrier is not very sturdy. This could be because my dog was over the recommended weight limit for the carrier. However, compared to other carriers I’ve tried, it still felt flimsy. I actually took the bottom out of a different carrier (much thicker plastic) and put it in this one and then had no issues of the carrier folding in on itself when my dog was inside.2. The outside pocket on this carrier is pretty much useless. I couldn’t even fit a ziplock bag of treats in it, let alone a leash. It could hold my leash if I was sitting down, but as soon as I would start walking around, it would fall right out of the top of it.3. I don’t love that there is only one zipper to zip the entire carrier together. This pretty much forces you to load/unload your dog on one side and one side only.4. The strap is VERY uncomfortable. I wish it was a touch more padded. My shoulder was pretty much dead walking through the airport with my dog inside. Wheels would be amazing, but I’m sure there are more expensive carriers out there with wheels.5. Once you lay down the mesh, expandable sides, and go to put them back in place, they do not stay in place and tend to fall slightly inside of the carrier. This takes up some room for the animal inside.Other than these five things, I really liked this carrier. The expandable sides are what sold me on it. I had zero problems with my four Alaska airlines flights! I did buy this carrier about two months in advance for my flight and did a TON of training with my dog. Highly recommend doing that with anyone getting ready to fly!
authors_reviews.author: Carli Dyba

other_countries_reviews.title: Trasportino validissimo
other_countries_reviews.text: Viaggio molto in aereo, trasportino super consigliato da inserire sotto il sedile avanti, il mio cane pesa 8 kg quindi non è così piccolo, ma adora questo trasportino in quanto è allungabile così lei dorme distesa serena per tutte le ore di volo intercontinentali davvero davvero davvero consigliatissimo per il benessere del tuo prezioso amato
other_countries_reviews.author: Charlie

other_countries_reviews.title: Me funcionó, buenas calidad
other_countries_reviews.text: Me encantó la maleta porque fue muy cómoda para mi perrito, sin embargo no fue muy cómodo cargarla porque mi perro pesaban 8 kg y para ese peso las correas lastiman un poco. La primera foto es de un vuelo con Volaris y la segunda con Air Europa en ninguna aerolinea tuve problema con el tamaño ni el peso pero en Volaris iba muy incómodo el perrito, la recomiendo para vuelos largos y en asiento con extra espacio para las piernas sino no cabe bien. En ningún avión cupo completamente debajo del asiento normal.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ileana Elizabeth Monsalvo Franco

other_countries_reviews.title: Bom produto, com ressalvas.
other_countries_reviews.text: Produto bom mas achei que podia ser mais firme pra manter o formato enquanto carrego à tiracolo, só que deforma na parte superior neste caso. O meu cachorro (yorkshire de 3 Kg) ficou bem dentro mas não sei como seria pra um cachorro maior.Também achei que as dobras internas ocupam algum espaço do animal quando as abas estão fechadas, durante o transporte à tiracolo, levando o forro de pele a dobrar pra cima do cachorro, podia ser melhor.Como na maior parte do tempo fica no chão as dimensões são bem mantidas e é muito confortável.De uma forma geral é um bom produto sim e recomendo.
other_countries_reviews.author: Vinicius Marchiori Silva

other_countries_reviews.title: Good item but not as described/shown
other_countries_reviews.text: Item was not the same as in the photo and description. Only 2 sides were expandable.
